=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN
Memorial Auditorium
Sacramento, California
9 October 2002 

Unidentified taper
Source/Lineage: no info
Very good sound 

CD1

1 intro, 2 Maggie's Farm (Bob on piano), 3 Tell Me That It Isn't True (Bob on piano and harp and Larry on pedal steel), 4 Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again (Bob on piano and harp and Larry on acoustic guitar), 5 Accidentally Like A Martyr (Song by Warren Zevon) (Bob on piano), 6 You Ain't Goin' Nowhere (Bob on piano and Larry on pedal steel), 7 Brown Sugar, 8 To Ramona (acoustic) (Larry on mandolin and Charlie on electric guitar), 9 It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic) (Bob on piano, Larry on cittern, Charlie on electric guitar and Tony on standup bass), 10 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic), 11 Drifter's Escape (Bob on harp), 12 Masters Of War (acoustic) (Charlie on dobro), 13 Old Man (acoustic) (Song by Neil Young) (Bob and Larry on acoustic guitars, Charlie on electric guitar and Tony on standup bass),

CD2

1 Honest With Me (Bob on piano and Larry on slide guitar), 2 One Too Many Mornings (acoustic) (Larry on pedal steel), 3 High Water (For Charley Patton) (Bob on piano), 4 Mutineer (Song by Warren Zevon) (Bob on piano and Larry on pedal steel), 5 Floater (Too Much To Ask) (Tony on standup bass), 6 Summer Days (Tony on standup bass), (encore), 7 Like A Rolling Stone, 8 Knockin' On Heaven's Door (acoustic) (Charlie on electric guitar), 9 All Along The Watchtower
